column.name: id
column.remarks: The id of the sector association contact

rollback.sql: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS sector_association_contact CASCADE;

column.name: competent_authority
column.remarks: The competent authority of the sector

column.name: name
column.remarks: The common name of the sector association

column.name: legal_name
column.remarks: The name of the sector/trade association

rollback.sql: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS sector_association CASCADE;
ALTER TABLE sector_association RENAME COLUMN facilitator_user_id TO facilitator;

createTable.remarks: Represents a target set of sector association or subsector association

column.name: id
column.remarks: The id of the target set

rollback.sql: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS target_set CASCADE;

createTable.remarks: Represents a sector association scheme document

column.name: file_size
column.remarks: The size of the file in bytes

column.name: file_type
column.remarks: The mime type of the file

column.name: status
column.remarks: The status of the document file

column.name: last_updated_on
column.remarks: When the document file last updated

rollback.sql: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS sector_association_scheme_document CASCADE;

column.name: id
column.remarks: The id of the sector association scheme

rollback.sql: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS sector_association_scheme CASCADE;

createTable.remarks: Represents a sector association target commitment

column.name: id
column.remarks: The id of the sector association scheme commitment

rollback.sql: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS target_commitment CASCADE;

column.name: id
column.remarks: The id of the subsector association

rollback.sql: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS subsector_association CASCADE;

column.name: id
column.remarks: The id of the subsector association scheme

rollback.sql: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS subsector_association_scheme CASCADE;

column.name: uma_date
column.remarks: The issue date of the umbrella agreement

column.name: sector_association_id
column.remarks: The sector association that this subsector belongs to

changeSet.author: apostolouk@unisystems.gr
changeSet.sql: update subsector_association sa set sector_association_id = sas.sector_association_id from subsector_association_scheme ssas, sector_association_scheme sas where sa.id = ssas.subsector_association_id and sas.id = ssas.sector_association_scheme_id

changeSet.author: apostolouk@unisystems.gr
apostolouk@unisystems.gr
changeSet.sql: delete from sector_association_scheme_document where file_name like '%facilities%';

changeSet.author: apostolouk@unisystems.gr

preConditions.sqlCheck: select count(1) from sector_association_scheme_document where file_name like 'Umbrella Agreement CCA2%';

changeSet.author: apostolouk@unisystems.gr

preConditions.sqlCheck: select count(1) from sector_association_scheme where scheme_version='CCA_3';

not.sqlCheck: select count(1) from sector_association_scheme where scheme_version='CCA_2';

changeSet.comment: Use temporary columns in sector_association_scheme_document and target_set to facilitate migration of data
changeSet.sql:
alter table sector_association_scheme_document add column sector_id int;
insert into sector_association_scheme_document (id, uuid, file_name, file_content, file_size, file_type, status, created_by, last_updated_on, sector_id) select nextval('sector_association_scheme_document_id_seq'), 'b84' || substr(sasd.uuid, 4, length(sasd.uuid)), replace(sasd.file_name, 'CCA2', 'CCA3') , decode( '          ' , 'base64'), 13, 'application/pdf', 'SUBMITTED', 'system', current_timestamp, sas.sector_association_id from sector_association_scheme_document sasd inner join sector_association_scheme sas on sasd.id = sas.umbrella_agreement_doc_id where sasd.file_name like '%Umbrella Agreement CCA2%';
changeSet.comment: Add target_set entries for CCA3, keeping a reference for sector/subsector schemes and target_commitment
changeSet.sql:
alter table target_set add column sector_id int, add column subsector_id int, add column is_cca3 int;
insert into target_set (id, target_currency_type, energy_or_carbon_unit, throughput_unit, sector_id, subsector_id, is_cca3) select nextval('target_set_id_seq'), 'Novem', ts.energy_or_carbon_unit , null, sas.sector_association_id, ssas.subsector_association_id, 1 from target_set ts left join sector_association_scheme sas on ts.id = sas.target_set_id left join subsector_association_scheme ssas on ts.id = ssas.target_set_id;
changeSet.comment: Add sector and subsector scheme entries for CCA3
changeSet.sql:
insert into sector_association_scheme (id, umbrella_agreement_doc_id, sector_association_id, target_set_id, uma_date, sector_definition, scheme_version) select nextval('sector_association_scheme_id_seq'), sasd.id, sas.sector_association_id , ts.id, sas.uma_date , sas.sector_definition , 'CCA_3' from sector_association_scheme sas inner join sector_association_scheme_document sasd on sas.sector_association_id = sasd.sector_id left join target_set ts on ts.sector_id = sasd.sector_id;
insert into subsector_association_scheme (id, subsector_association_id, target_set_id, scheme_version) select nextval('subsector_association_scheme_id_seq'), ssas.subsector_association_id, ts.id, 'CCA_3' from subsector_association_scheme ssas inner join target_set ts on ts.subsector_id = ssas.subsector_association_id;
